subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath arisen to serve and hath caused the servants to be quickened by the sweet savours of revelation and the rustling of the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]... ...This Day is different from other days, and this Cause different from other causes
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفسیکه بر خدمت قیام نمود و عباد را بنفحات وحی و صریر قلم اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
